  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
  2. AbstractPart

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.AbstractPart

Packages that use AbstractPart
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context
Manages the conversation history and the injection of just-in-time context.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides classes related to web grounding and RAG.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code
Provides specialized message parts for server-side code execution.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.web
Web-centric message extensions and grounding metadata.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.adapter
Provides adapter classes for converting between the core domain model and the native Gemini API types.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.adapter
Provides specialized adapters for translating between Anahata's model-agnostic domain objects and OpenAI-compatible wire formats.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message
Contains UI components for rendering different types of messages in the conversation.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part
Provides base classes and factories for rendering individual parts of an ASI message.

  • Uses of AbstractPart in uno.anahata.asi.agi.context

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.context with parameters of type AbstractPart
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ContextManager.identifyPart(AbstractPart part)
    Assigns a sequential ID to a single part if it doesn't already have one.

  • Uses of AbstractPart in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message

    Subclasses of AbstractPart in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BlobPart
    An abstract base class for binary data parts, such as an image or a document.
    class 
    ModelBlobPart
    A specialized BlobPart for binary content generated by the model, including internal thought process details.
    class 
    ModelTextPart
    A specialized TextPart for content generated by an AI model.
    class 
    TextPart
    An abstract base class for text-based message parts.
    class 
    UserBlobPart
    A concrete BlobPart implementation for binary content provided by the user.
    class 
    UserTextPart
    A concrete TextPart implementation for text content provided by the user.
    Fields in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message with type parameters of type AbstractPart
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final List<AbstractPart>
    AbstractMessage.parts
    The list of parts that make up the message content.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message that return types with arguments of type AbstractPart
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<AbstractPart>
    AbstractMessage.getParts()
    Gets an unmodifiable list of all parts in this message.
    List<AbstractPart>
    AbstractMessage.getParts(boolean includePruned)
    The definitive, encapsulated method for retrieving the parts of a message that should be sent to the model, respecting the pruning policy.
    List<AbstractPart>
    RagMessage.getParts(boolean includePruned)
    Overrides the default part filtering logic.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message with parameters of type AbstractPart
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AbstractMessage.addPart(@NonNull AbstractPart part)
    Safely adds a single part to this message, establishing the bidirectional relationship and ensuring the part is fully initialized before firing property change events.
    void
    AbstractMessage.removePart(AbstractPart part)
    Removes a part from this message and severs the bidirectional link.
    void
    AbstractModelMessage.removePart(AbstractPart part)
    Removes a part from this message and severs the bidirectional link.

  • Uses of AbstractPart in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code

    Subclasses of AbstractPart in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HostedCodeExecutionCallPart
    A specialized part representing a request from the model to execute code on the server (e.g., Python in OpenAI's Code Interpreter or Gemini's Code Execution).
    class 
    HostedCodeExecutionResultPart
    A specialized part representing the output or logs from a server-side code execution.

  • Uses of AbstractPart in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.web

    Subclasses of AbstractPart in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.web
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    WebSearchCallPart
    A specialized part representing a search query or search intent generated by the model.

    AbstractToolCall<T extends AbstractTool<?,?>, R extends AbstractToolResponse<?>>

    BadToolCall

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractPart
    GeminiModelMessage.toAnahataPart(com.google.genai.types.Part googlePart)
    Converts a Google GenAI Part to an Anahata AbstractPart within the context of this message.
